summary: Capsule precisely identifies disk-full on /var as root cause with escalating disk-usage triggers and the FATAL shutdown consequence; causal roles are correct and the evidence chain is complete, missing only the systemd restart confirmation.
improvements: Include the systemd 'Scheduled restart job, restart counter is at 1' line (line 18) as a consequence so the engineer knows whether automatic recovery was attempted

Include the systemd 'Main process exited, code=exited, status=1/FAILURE' and 'Failed with result exit-code' lines (14-15) as consequences to confirm the OS-level process termination alongside the application FATAL
